task_description:
为我生成一张现代简洁的登录页面设计图片，只要登录页就行。页面应该包含：用户名/邮箱输入框、密码输入框、登录按钮、忘记密码链接。设计风格现代、简洁、专业，配色清爽。生成为 PNG 或 JPG 图片格式，保存到 ~/Desktop/

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# 创建画布 - 现代登录页面尺寸（宽 x 高）
width, height = 400, 560
image = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color='#FFFFFF')
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(image)

# 定义颜色体系（清爽现代风格）
color_primary = '#0066CC'      # 现代蓝
color_text_dark = '#1A1A1A'   # 深灰文字
color_text_light = '#666666'  # 浅灰文字
color_border = '#E0E0E0'      # 淡边框
color_bg_light = '#F8F9FA'    # 浅背景
color_button_hover = '#0052A3' # 按钮深蓝

# 绘制顶部装饰背景条
draw.rectangle(
    [(0, 0), (width, 100)],
    fill='#F0F4F9'  # 淡蓝背景
)

# 绘制渐变色线条（模拟现代感）
draw.rectangle(
    [(0, 95), (width, 100)],
    fill=color_primary
)

# 标题 "登录"
try:
    # 尝试使用系统字体
    title_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/PingFang.ttc', 32)
    label_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/PingFang.ttc', 14)
    text_font = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/PingFang.ttc', 12)
except:
    # 降级到默认字体
    title_font = ImageFont.load_default()
    label_font = ImageFont.load_default()
    text_font = ImageFont.load_default()

# 绘制标题
draw.text(
    (width // 2, 40),
    "登 录",
    fill=color_primary,
    font=title_font,
    anchor='mm'
)

# 绘制副标题
draw.text(
    (width // 2, 75),
    "Welcome Back",
    fill=color_text_light,
    font=text_font,
    anchor='mm'
)

# 内容区域 Y 坐标
y_pos = 140

# 绘制邮箱/用户名标签和输入框
draw.text(
    (30, y_pos),
    "邮箱/用户名",
    fill=color_text_dark,
    font=label_font
)
y_pos += 25

# 邮箱输入框
input_box_y = y_pos
draw.rectangle(
    [(25, input_box_y), (375, input_box_y + 44)],
    fill='#FFFFFF',
    outline=color_border,
    width=2
)
# 输入框内提示文字
draw.text(
    (40, input_box_y + 22),
    "example@email.com",
    fill='#CCCCCC',
    font=text_font,
    anchor='lm'
)

y_pos += 65

# 绘制密码标签和输入框
draw.text(
    (30, y_pos),
    "密 码",
    fill=color_text_dark,
    font=label_font
)
y_pos += 25

# 密码输入框
password_box_y = y_pos
draw.rectangle(
    [(25, password_box_y), (375, password_box_y + 44)],
    fill='#FFFFFF',
    outline=color_border,
    width=2
)
# 密码框内圆点（表示输入状态）
for i in range(4):
    draw.ellipse(
        [(45 + i * 12, password_box_y + 18), (50 + i * 12, password_box_y + 23)],
        fill='#999999'
    )

y_pos += 70

# 绘制忘记密码链接（右对齐）
draw.text(
    (375, y_pos),
    "忘记密码？",
    fill=color_primary,
    font=text_font,
    anchor='rm'
)

y_pos += 35

# 绘制登录按钮（现代风格 - 圆角按钮）
button_y = y_pos
button_x_left = 25
button_x_right = 375
button_height = 50

# 使用矩形替代圆角（Pillow 简化方案）
draw.rectangle(
    [(button_x_left, button_y), (button_x_right, button_y + button_height)],
    fill=color_primary,
    outline=color_primary,
    width=0
)

# 按钮文字
draw.text(
    ((button_x_left + button_x_right) // 2, button_y + button_height // 2),
    "登 录",
    fill='#FFFFFF',
    font=label_font,
    anchor='mm'
)

y_pos += button_height + 30

# 绘制注册链接
register_text = "还没有账户？"
register_link = "立即注册"

draw.text(
    (width // 2 - 50, y_pos),
    register_text,
    fill=color_text_light,
    font=text_font,
    anchor='lm'
)

draw.text(
    (width // 2 + 50, y_pos),
    register_link,
    fill=color_primary,
    font=text_font,
    anchor='lm'
)

# 保存图片
output_path = '/Users/lzz/Desktop/login_page_design.png'
image.save(output_path, 'PNG')

print(f'✓ 登录页面设计已生成')
print(f'✓ 保存路径：{output_path}')
print(f'✓ 设计特点：')
print(f'  - 现代简洁风格，清爽蓝色配色')
print(f'  - 包含用户名/邮箱输入框')
print(f'  - 包含密码输入框')
print(f'  - 登录按钮（现代蓝色设计）')
print(f'  - 忘记密码链接')
print(f'  - 注册链接')
print(f'  - 专业化视觉层级和间距')
